text: Standing in this modern hallway, peering into a space designed for gathering and reflection, I feel anticipation and a slight curiosity. The glass, the scattered electronics, the fire extinguisher—all remind me how environments can shape thought. Moving further in, the vibrant, visually overloaded wall dedicated to 'R+D' enchants me; it feels like a liminal zone between creativity and analysis. I feel energized and reflective, sensing that I am immersed in a celebration of innovation, yet invited to question the very nature of progress I see displayed.
